case_title: PRIMUS AUTO FINANCIAL VS. NIKA G VAKS

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMUS AUTO FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT VAKS, NIKA G JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
